name: Reputation Badge
description: User reputation score display with numeric score, trust level indicator, and progress toward next trust threshold. Used in dashboards, content cards, and moderation views.

standard.description: Inline reputation display with score number and trust level icon. Color-coded by trust threshold.

slots.icon: Trust level icon: shield for trusted, star for rising, circle for new
slots.label: Trust level text (Trusted / Rising / New)

large.description: Large reputation card with score, trust level, progress bar toward trust threshold (50 points), and stats breakdown.

slots.header: Trust level icon and label with large score number
slots.progress-bar: Progress bar toward trust threshold (50 points)
slots.stats: Approved count, rejected count, featured count row

compact.description: Minimal inline score number with colored dot indicator. For content cards and list items.

slots.dot: Colored dot: green for trusted, yellow for rising, gray for new

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';
